description: Style NoteSuper comfy shorts from inaya. We love the smooth, satiny feel of the fabric. It' doesn't feature with bright cartoon print or checks so you can wear this at home all day. You can even pair this with a tee for a quick grocery run.  What's more it's organic - the  fabric (modal) is cellulose fiber extracted from beechwood!Product DetailsBrown cropped shorts (approximately one inch below the knee), has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring feature and a printed tag-less innerMaterial and Care95% modal 5% lycraMachine wash at 40 degrees in gentle cycleDo not bleachTumble dry
